# IChildProcess.Kill method

Forcibly signals the process (R-8.6.3-a). On a real child this maps to a graceful terminate (Terminate, POSIX SIGTERM) or a forced kill (Force, POSIX SIGKILL); in tests it is observed to assert escalation.

```csharp
public void Kill(KillSignal signal)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| signal | The signal to deliver. |
